title: Meta stock sinks after Q1 earnings as company raises 2026 AI spending forecast to $125 billion-$145 billion
author: Sigma Capital
metaDescription: Meta stock dropped significantly after Q1 earnings as the company raised its 2026 capital expenditure forecast to $125-$145 billion, up from $115-$135 billion.
excerpt: Meta stock dropped significantly after Q1 earnings as the company raised its 2026 capital expenditure forecast to $125-$145 billion, up from $115-$135 billion. This increase in projected spending led to a 10% decline in Meta's stock price.

content.introduction: Meta stock dropped significantly after Q1 earnings as the company raised its 2026 capital expenditure forecast to $125-$145 billion, up from $115-$135 billion. This increase in projected spending led to a 10% decline in Meta's stock price.
body: Meta increased its projected capital spending for the year by $10 billion, to a new range of $125 billion to $145 billion, citing “expectations
Meta stock sinks as its AI spending forecast shoots up to $145 billion. The company beat revenue estimates and posted strong profit growth, but

Zuckerberg [told analysts](https://www.investors.com/news/technology/meta-stock-q4-ai-spending/) in January that the company expects to spend $115 billion to $135 billion on 2026 capital expenditures. That's after spending about $70 billion in 2025, a total that was [revised higher by Meta](https://www.investors.com/news/technology/meta-stock-q3-2025-earnings-ai-meta-news-zuckerberg/) throughout the year. On the [stock market today](https://www.investors.com/news/stock-market-today-stock-market-news/?), Meta stock dropped more than 7% to 616 premarket. *   ##### [Stock Market Today: Dow Adds 700 Points; Meta Falls, Lilly Up 10% As AI Data Centers Lead Gains (Live Coverage)](https://www.investors.com/market-trend/stock-market-today/dow-jones-sp500-nasdaq-inflation-data-meta-stock-meta-earnings/). *   ##### [Meta Stock Edges Lower With Q1 Results Due.
